intro: Fleet doctrines: who flies what, rough counts, and quick links. Edit fleet-tracker/data/doctrines.json or set FLEET_TRACKER_DOCTRINES_PATH.

doctrines.summary: Close-range shield cruisers with light logi; default standing fleet comp.
doctrines.comms_note: Fleet voice + ping tag per your alliance SOP.

hulls.name: Caracal (RLML)
hulls.note: Bring navy ammo; reship available in staging.

hulls.name: Osprey Navy Issue
hulls.note: Optional upgrade hull — confirm SRP tier.

hulls.name: Osprey
hulls.note: Cap chain not required; stay with anchor.

fleet_roles.description: Griffins + Maulus as called by FC.

pitfalls: Do not wardecc cyno alts — keep doctrine in fleet window only.
If you are late to tidi, post arrival time in fleet notes.

doctrines.summary: Interdictors + T1 tackle for null roaming; disposable.

fleet_roles.description: First on grid, call points early.

pitfalls: No SRP for solo yolos off fleet beacon.
